name: drg
title: OCI Transit — Dynamic Routing Gateway
summary: Creates an upgraded DRG with custom DRG route tables, VCN attachments, static DRG routes, and cross-region Remote Peering Connections.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory freeform tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' freeform tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' freeform tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional freeform tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: compartment_id
module.description: OCID of the compartment for the DRG.

module.name: drg_route_tables
module.description: Logical names of custom DRG route tables to create (e.g., [\"prod\", \"shared\", \"inspection\"]).

module.name: vcn_attachments
module.type: map(object({ vcn_id = string drg_route_table_key = optional(string) vcn_route_table_id = optional(string) }))
module.description: VCN attachments keyed by logical name. drg_route_table_key assigns a custom DRG route table created by this module.

module.name: static_routes
module.type: map(object({ drg_route_table_key = string destination_cidr = string next_hop_attachment_key = string }))
module.description: Static DRG routes keyed by logical name, pointing a CIDR at a VCN attachment.

module.name: remote_peering_connections
module.description: Remote peering connections (cross-region DRG-to-DRG) keyed by logical name. The initiating side sets peer_rpc_id + peer_region_name; the accepting side leaves both null.

outputs.name: hub_id
outputs.description: OCID of the DRG. VCN route rules targeting the DRG use this OCID; hybrid-connectivity modules attach to it.

outputs.name: attachment_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical attachment name to DRG attachment OCID.

outputs.name: route_table_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical route table name to DRG route table OCID.

outputs.name: rpc_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical remote peering connection name to RPC OCID (hand to the peer region's initiating side).
